visual_description: A person in a white shirt and dark pants stands with their back to the camera, leaning on a railing, while another person in a dark suit stands nearby, also facing away. The person in the white shirt appears to be adjusting or interacting with a transparent plastic sheet draped over a railing. The scene is dimly lit, set on an outdoor balcony or walkway at night, with buildings visible in the background.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a neutral tone and moderate pace, accompanied by background music and occasional sound effects.
